---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who has it, when does it hurt?

## Proposed solution

How you'd solve it. Keep it concrete.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why you'd skip them.

## Scope check

- [ ] Fits the scope in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) (native popup, selection-based AI actions, etc.)
- [ ] Not already in [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, references.
